properties.name: Rathausplatz
properties.description: Main civic square in front of City Hall. Hosts Christmas market, summer festivals, and community events.

properties.name: Gänseliesel-Platz
properties.description: Small civic square in Fallersleben old town.

properties.name: Sara-Frenkel-Platz
properties.description: Named memorial square near the Hauptbahnhof and Phaeno.

properties.name: Brandenburger Platz
properties.description: Pedestrian square in the Westhagen residential area.

properties.name: Plaza (Autostadt-Bereich)
properties.description: Named plaza in the Autostadt district.

properties.name: Schützenplatz Fallersleben
properties.description: Historic Schützenplatz in Fallersleben.

properties.name: Schlosspark Wolfsburg
properties.description: Historic park surrounding Wolfsburg Castle (now housing the Stadtmuseum). Walking paths, lawns, and the Barockgarten.

properties.name: Schloßpark Fallersleben
properties.description: Park surrounding Schloss Fallersleben, birthplace of Hoffmann von Fallersleben. Historic trees and garden layout.

properties.name: Klieversberg Park
properties.description: Forested hill park south of the city centre. Walking trails through woodland with views over Wolfsburg and the VW plant.

properties.name: Otto-Wels-Platz
properties.description: Village green / small park in the city centre area.

properties.name: Am Ehrenfriedhof
properties.description: Park area at the memorial cemetery in the northeast.

properties.name: Gutspark
properties.description: Estate park in the Wolfsburg-Süd area.

properties.name: Wasserpark Hehlingen
properties.description: Water-themed park in the Hehlingen district.

properties.name: Park Detmerode
properties.description: Neighborhood park in the Detmerode residential area.

properties.name: Rodelberg Neindorf
properties.description: Sledging hill park in the Neindorf area.

properties.name: Schäferkamp
properties.description: Green open space in the southern Wolfsburg area.

properties.name: Schwefelpark
properties.description: Neighborhood park in the Fallersleben / Wessinghausen area.

properties.name: Übungsfläche Allerpark
properties.description: Lawn exercise and recreation area on the edge of Allerpark.

properties.name: Arboretum
properties.description: Tree collection garden in southern Wolfsburg. Educational and recreational character.

properties.name: Glepner
properties.description: Small interblock green space in Detmerode.

properties.name: Generationen-Garten
properties.description: Intergenerational garden space in the Steimker Gärten neighbourhood.

properties.name: Dorfmitte
properties.description: Village green in the Almke rural district.

properties.name: Schulgarten
properties.description: School garden space in the northeastern residential area.

properties.name: Bibelgarten
properties.description: Themed Bible garden in the southern Wolfsburg rural area.

properties.name: Barockgarten
properties.description: Formal baroque garden adjacent to Schloss Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Allerpark
properties.description: Wolfsburg's primary green infrastructure. Linear park along the Aller River including the Allersee lake, sports fields, cycling trails, and nature zones.

properties.name: Mittellandkanal Greenway
properties.description: Canal-side green corridor along the Mittellandkanal. Walking and cycling path connecting the city east–west. Currently informal and underdesigned.

properties.name: Erlengrund
properties.description: Nature reserve and green corridor in southern Wolfsburg. Alder woodland and wetland habitat.

properties.name: Südliche Düpenwiesen
properties.description: Nature reserve meadowland in western Wolfsburg along the Düpenau stream corridor.

properties.name: Barnstorfer Wald
properties.description: Large forest nature reserve in southeastern Wolfsburg. Walking and cycling trails through ancient woodland.

properties.name: Talniederung im Barnstorfer Wald
properties.description: Valley floor nature reserve within the Barnstorf forest complex.

properties.name: Hohnstedter Holz
properties.description: Woodland nature reserve in the western Wolfsburg rural area.

properties.name: NSG Almker Mergelgruben
properties.description: Protected nature reserve with former chalk pits near Almke. Rare calcareous grassland habitat.

properties.name: Allersee Promenade
properties.description: Continuous promenade and cycle path around the Allersee lake. Wolfsburg's most popular recreational loop — walking, cycling, and water views.

properties.name: Mittellandkanal Promenade
properties.description: Canalside walkway along the Mittellandkanal near the Autostadt. Views of the canal and the iconic VW car towers.

properties.name: Spielzone
properties.description: Play zone in the southwestern Wolfsburg area.

properties.name: Bolzplatz Westhagen
properties.description: Informal ball games area in the Westhagen district.

properties.name: Bolzplatz Almke
properties.description: Ball games area in the Almke district.

properties.name: Spielplatz an der Goetheschule
properties.description: School-adjacent playground near the Goethe school.

properties.name: Aktivspielplatz Fallersleben
properties.description: Adventure playground in Fallersleben — one of Wolfsburg's larger dedicated play areas.

properties.name: Kletterinstallationen
properties.description: Climbing installations play area near the Autostadt district.

properties.name: Spielplastik am Schillerteich
properties.description: Play sculpture area by the Schillerteich pond.

properties.name: Spielplatz KGV Kraunsbusch
properties.description: Playground at the Kraunsbusch allotment area.

properties.name: MobiVersum
properties.description: Mobility-themed outdoor play installation near the Autostadt.

properties.name: Rodelberg Playground
properties.description: Play and sledging hill in the northern Wolfsburg area.

properties.name: Spielplatz Von-Ebner-Eschenbach-Ring
properties.description: Residential playground in the Steimker Gärten area.

properties.name: Spielplatz Selma-Lagerlöf-Ring
properties.description: Residential playground in the Steimker Gärten area.

properties.name: Kinderspielplatz Hehlingen
properties.description: Children's playground in the Hehlingen district.

properties.name: Seilspielplatz Bodenlos
properties.description: Rope and adventure playground near Badeland.

properties.name: Spielplatz Teichgarten
properties.description: Playground in the Teichgarten residential area.

properties.name: Spielplatz Nahestraße
properties.description: Playground on Nahestraße in Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Freizeitpark Westhagen
properties.description: Leisure park and play area in Westhagen — one of the larger play provisions in the western districts.

properties.name: Spielplatz Reislingen
properties.description: Playground at the old school site in Reislingen.

properties.name: Fanny-Lewald-Ring Süd
properties.description: Playground in the Steimker Gärten southern sector.

properties.name: Jugendspielort Kerksiek
properties.description: Youth play area in Kerksiek, southwestern Wolfsburg.

properties.description: Residential playground on Gladiolenweg in Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.description: Playground on Stellfelder Straße in the Detmerode area.

properties.name: Kinderspielplatz Dahlienweg 7-9
properties.description: Children's playground on Dahlienweg, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.description: Playground on Dahlienweg 5, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Spielplatz Kiebitzweg
properties.description: Playground on Kiebitzweg, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Kinderspielplatz Lahnstraße II
properties.description: Children's playground on Lahnstraße, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Kinderspielplatz Am Krokusplan
properties.description: Children's playground at Am Krokusplan, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Mini Spielplatz 1
properties.description: Very small toddler play area in Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Kita Steimker Gärten Spielplatz
properties.description: Kindergarten play area in the Steimker Gärten development.

properties.name: Spielplatz Am Krokusplan Ost
properties.description: Eastern playground at Am Krokusplan, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: Spielplatz Teichgarten 5
properties.description: Playground in the Teichgarten residential block.

properties.name: Spielplatz Brahmsring
properties.description: Playground on Brahmsring in the western residential area.

properties.name: Bolzplatz Am Zehnten Weg
properties.description: Ball games area on Am Zehnten Weg.

properties.name: KGV Sonnenschein
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Sonnenschein — allotment garden complex in Detmerode.

properties.name: KGV Westersieck
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Westersieck — allotment complex in Detmerode.

properties.name: KGV Wellekamp
properties.description: Allotment gardens in the western city area.

properties.name: KGV Am Laagberg
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Am Laagberg — large allotment complex in southwestern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: KGV Detmerode
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Detmerode allotment gardens.

properties.name: Zum Fuhrenkamp I
properties.description: Allotment garden complex in northeastern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Zum Fuhrenkamp II
properties.description: Second allotment complex at Fuhrenkamp in northeastern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: KGV Morgenfelde Wendschott
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Am Morgenfelde Wendschott — allotment complex in Wendschott.

properties.name: KGV Kraunsbusch
properties.description: Large allotment garden complex in the Kraunsbusch area, north Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Gärten der Nationen
properties.description: Gardens of Nations — multicultural community garden in southwestern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Kleingarten Neindorf
properties.description: Allotment gardens in the Neindorf village.

properties.name: KGV Hattorf
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Hattorf allotment gardens.

properties.name: KGV Behrendorfer Wiesen
properties.description: Allotment gardens in Behrendorf.

properties.name: KGV An der Schreiberheide
properties.description: Allotment complex at Schreiberheide in eastern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: KGV Neuland I
properties.description: Kleingartenverein Neuland — first plot in the Fallersleben area.

properties.name: KGV Neuland II
properties.description: Kleingartenverein Neuland — second plot in the Fallersleben area.

properties.name: KGV Moorbreite
properties.description: Kleingartenverein Moorbreite in eastern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: KGV Am Schäferbusch
properties.description: Allotment gardens at Schäferbusch, Wolfsburg-Ost.

properties.name: KGV Schillerteich
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Schillerteich allotment gardens.

properties.name: KGV Ernteglück
properties.description: Kleingärtnerverein Ernteglück allotment gardens.

properties.name: Imkerei (Allotment)
properties.description: Beekeeping allotment in northern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Porschestraße (Fußgängerzone)
properties.description: Wolfsburg's main pedestrian shopping street — fully pedestrianised Fußgängerzone. Lacks trees, seating, and greenery. Major upgrade potential.

properties.name: Hollerplatz
properties.description: Pedestrianised urban space in the Südstadt area.

properties.name: Kaufhofpassage
properties.description: Pedestrian passage through the city centre retail block.

properties.name: Maximilian-Kolbe-Weg
properties.description: Named pedestrian way in the city centre.

properties.name: Quartierspromenade Steimker Gärten
properties.description: Residential promenade in the new Steimker Gärten development — one of Wolfsburg's better-designed pedestrian streets.

properties.name: Hansaplatz
properties.description: Pedestrian area in the Hansaplatz neighbourhood, northeastern Wolfsburg.

properties.name: Marktplatz Fallersleben
properties.description: Historic market place in Fallersleben old town with the Springbrunnen fountain.

properties.name: Allersee Freibad & Beach
properties.description: Summer outdoor swimming area and sandy beach on the Allersee. Wolfsburg's primary urban beach, highly popular June–September.

properties.name: VW-Bad
properties.description: VW employee and public outdoor swimming facility.

properties.name: Badeland Wolfsburg
properties.description: Major indoor/outdoor water park on the Allersee. Year-round aquatic leisure destination.

properties.name: Freibad Almke
properties.description: Outdoor swimming pool in the Almke district — community Freibad serving the southern area.

properties.name: Schwimminsel Allersee
properties.description: Swimming island in the Allersee lake near Badeland.

properties.name: Künstliche Insel (Allersee)
properties.description: Artificial island in the Allersee — recreational node within the lake.

properties.name: phaeno Science Centre
properties.description: Zaha Hadid's phaeno (2005) — raised on concrete cones creating a covered public undercroft. One of Wolfsburg's most architecturally significant public spaces.

properties.name: Autostadt
properties.description: Volkswagen's Autostadt — brand theme park and delivery centre. Major cultural attraction with pavilions, water features, and the iconic glass car towers.

properties.name: ZeitHaus (Autostadt)
properties.description: Classic car museum within the Autostadt complex.

properties.name: Scharoun-Theater Wolfsburg
properties.description: Hans Scharoun's Wolfsburg Theatre (1973) — a key building in the Kulturmeile. The forecourt links theatre and city.

properties.name: Kunstmuseum Wolfsburg
properties.description: Contemporary art museum forecourt on the Porschestraße / Kulturmeile. Public art in the external space activates the street edge.

properties.name: AutoMuseum Volkswagen
properties.description: Volkswagen automobile museum with public forecourt.

properties.name: Stadtmuseum Schloss Wolfsburg
properties.description: City museum housed in the historic Wolfsburg Castle. Castle courtyard and forecourt as public space.

properties.name: Hoffmann-von-Fallersleben-Museum
properties.description: Museum dedicated to the poet August Heinrich Hoffmann von Fallersleben, author of the German national anthem. In the Schloss Fallersleben.

properties.name: Landwirtschaftsmuseum Wolfsburg
properties.description: Agricultural museum near Schloss Wolfsburg with outdoor exhibits.

properties.name: Willy-Brandt-Platz / Hauptbahnhof
properties.description: Main arrival gateway of Wolfsburg linking the Hauptbahnhof, phaeno, and Autostadt. High pedestrian throughput but dominated by vehicle traffic. Significantly underperforms its potential.

properties.name: Autostadt Glastürme (Viewing Decks)
properties.description: The iconic cylindrical glass car delivery towers of the Autostadt include elevated viewing platforms. Requires Autostadt entry. The only elevated public viewpoint in Wolfsburg — this typology is absent in the free public realm.
properties.status: Gap — no fully public elevated space
